S18.method: Playwright document+_serverFn rewrite: SSR stale:!1→stale:!0, freshnessAgeSeconds:0→99999, staleReason string; seroval special-ref false(s:3)→true(s:2) on client refetch

S20.method: Playwright _serverFn: force top-level result.error={code:ART_S20_FORCED_ERROR,message} + surfaceState=error (seroval object node); HTTP 200

S19.method: Playwright route: delay fetch/xhr by 15s during work navigation; screenshot at t≈1.5s (skeleton visible)
